calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-30-2019 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jul-10-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTs BLATTEIS REALTY CO., INC., and JEREMY BLATTEIS' Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award

Petitioners and Defendants Blatteis Realty Co., Inc. and Jeremy Blatteis' petition to confirm contractual arbitration award is granted. Plaintiff Richard Jones has failed to show that any of the limited statutory grounds for vacating an arbitration award under Code of Civil Procedure 1286.2 is applicable. "Generally, courts cannot review arbitration awards for errors of fact or law, even when those errors appear on the face of the award or cause substantial injustice to the parties." (Richey v. AutoNation, Inc. (2015) 60 Cal.4th 909, 916; see also Moncharsh v. Heily & Blase (1992) 3 Cal.4th 1, 11.) Plaintiff has failed to show that the arbitrator exceeded his powers by failing to follow California law. (See Safari Associates v. Superior Court (2014) 231 Cal.App.4th 1400, 1403-04 ["California law is clear that 'arbitrators do not "exceed[ ] their powers" . . . merely by rendering an erroneous decision on a legal or factual issue, so long as the issue was within the scope of the controversy submitted to the arbitrators.'"]). Further, the 16-page corrected final award amply satisfies the requirement of the arbitration agreement that the arbitrator issue a written decision explaining his findings and conclusions of law.

Order and Judgment are signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
